full_text:
Zhang Jian 張戩
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Jian (張戩)was born in Xiuwu county, Henei commandery. Held captive by bandits, his uncle Zhang Fan was willing to trade his own son for the young Zhang Jian. Released.
